This is an experimental feature... 

1) You need to download LLVM@14 (version 14 or above). See HW1/docs/lab1.md file for instructions.
2) You can run your quad files if they are output as *.4-xml.quad file and place under HW5/test directory
3) Use "make run" to run all the quad files, and use "make run-one FILE=file" to run one quad file.
